boundary_interpretation: business_date = local_calendar_date when local_time >= business_day_boundary_local_time; otherwise previous_local_calendar_date

entries.notes: Phase-1 default business-day boundary policy. The 03:00 boundary is an explicit data-platform governance decision inferred from the formal Qinqin access window opening at 03:00 and the documented 03:10 daily sync start.

notes: This registry is a governed data-platform object, not runtime config. Future org_ref or store_ref overrides must be added here and follow the declared resolution_hierarchy.
